creator: alex.wilkinson@dsto.defence.gov.au
text:
Upon executing /usr/local/bin/wfcmgr, wfcgmr "hangs". ^T tells me that it is in a  wait channel of [ptsopn] e.g.

#wfcmgr
load: 0.05  cmd: wfcmgr 98017 [ptsopn] 0.17u 0.03s 0% 7280k
load: 0.05  cmd: wfcmgr 98017 [ptsopn] 0.17u 0.03s 0% 7280k
load: 0.05  cmd: wfcmgr 98017 [ptsopn] 0.17u 0.03s 0% 7280k
load: 0.05  cmd: wfcmgr 98017 [ptsopn] 0.17u 0.03s 0% 7280k
load: 0.05  cmd: wfcmgr 98017 [ptsopn] 0.17u 0.03s 0% 7280k
^C
#

Fix: 

#mkdir /compat/linux/dev/ 

seems to solve the problem, well at least it makes /usr/local/bin/wfcmgr useable.
How-To-Repeat: #cd /usr/ports/net/citrix_ica/
#make install clean
#/usr/local/bin/wfcmgr
^T
